zh.Barthomley, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾巴堂姆利
zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Praers於大約1170年出生在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆時，他的父親William of Barthomley de Praers31歲，母親Elizabeth de Prethorn29歲。他於大約1197年與Evelyn de Riandeau在英國爾巴堂姆利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1220年在英國爾巴堂姆利享年51歲。

zh-hans.Barthomley, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾巴堂姆利
zh-hans.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Praers于大约1170年出生在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆时，他的父亲William of Barthomley de Praers31岁，母亲Elizabeth de Prethorn29岁。他于大约1197年与Evelyn de Riandeau在英国爾巴堂姆利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1220年在英国爾巴堂姆利享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Praers was born about 1170, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, William of Barthomley de Praers, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth de Prethorn, was 29. He married Evelyn de Riandeau about 1197, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1220, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Praers est né environ 1170, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William of Barthomley de Praers, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Prethorn, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Evelyn de Riandeau environ 1197, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1220, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Praers um 1170 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William of Barthomley de Praers 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Prethorn 29. Er hat um 1197 in Barthomley, Cheshire, England Evelyn de Riandeau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1220 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Praers è nato il circa 1170 nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, il suo padre, William of Barthomley de Praers, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Prethorn, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Evelyn de Riandeau circa 1197, nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1220, nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Praersが約1170年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父William of Barthomley de Praersは31歳，母Elizabeth de Prethornは29歳であった。約1197年にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーでEvelyn de Riandeauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1220年にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Praers(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William of Barthomley de Praers(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Prethorn(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1197년 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 Evelyn de Riandeau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1220년 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1159: de 8 de janeiro de 1159 a 7 de janeiro de 1160
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Praers nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William of Barthomley de Praers, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Prethorn, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Evelyn de Riandeau aproximadamente 1197, em Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1220, em Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Praers родился около 1170 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William of Barthomley de Praers было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Prethorn, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Evelyn de Riandeau около 1197 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
